title: Changed Vanilla
description: Addon mod for Changed containing transfurs for vanilla mobs.
body:
--- **Changed Vanilla** is an addon mod for the **Changed: Minecraft Mod**. Based upon the character concepts by Puppetmaster13u, players can experience Minecraft from an alternative perspective and playstyle. Changed Vanilla adds an anthropomorphic counterpart for every mob in Vanilla Minecraft. These mobs are very dangerous and will attempt to infect players on sight. They'll also infect mobs to become hostile and further spread the infection. However, through Changed's transformation system, players can become one of the many mobs in this mod, which in turn exposes a whole new way to play Minecraft that is unique to which form they choose.
Spoiler - Featured Variants **Creeper** - A taur-like creature that blends into grass. Don a saddle to offer a ride for other players. Expand your inventory by equipping a chest. **Spider** - A creature that thrives in caves with enhanced night vision. Hold items in those extra hands and easily swap between them on demand. As a spider, players can create cobweb on demand and climb walls.
Spoiler - Upcoming Variants **Guardian** - An ocean-bound creature that excels at swimming. Take on the seas from below the surface with gills and a laser beam attack. **Ghast** - A large floating leviathan that flies freely through the air. And even more to come!
